goal: List the files in the current directory and summarize the project structure
summary: Read-only reconnaissance task: enumerate all files in D:\News\Business\AIOrchestrator and produce a structured summary of the Gorechera project layout, package responsibilities, and key entry points. No code changes required.
product_scope: Enumerate all files/directories in the workspace root
Identify Go package structure under cmd/ and internal/
Summarize each package's responsibility in 1-2 sentences
Note key entry points (main.go, service.go, provider.go)
List documentation files and their topics
proposed_steps: Step 1 (executor): List all files recursively (excluding .git), group by top-level directory, and produce a tree-style summary

Step 2 (executor): Read package doc comments or first lines of key .go files to summarize each package's role: cmd/gorechera, internal/api, internal/domain, internal/orchestrator, internal/policy, internal/provider, internal/runtime, internal/schema, internal/store
Step 3 (executor): Compile final summary artifact with: (a) directory tree, (b) package responsibility table, (c) entry points, (d) doc index
success_signals: Summary artifact written to step artifacts

verification_contract.goal: Verify the project structure summary is accurate and complete
scope: Accuracy of file listing against actual filesystem
Correctness of package descriptions against source code
required_checks: File tree matches output of recursive directory listing
Each listed Go package exists and description matches its actual code
Entry points (main.go, service.go, provider.go) are correctly identified
disallowed_actions: No file creation or modification outside artifacts
verification_contract.notes: Read-only task. Build command is a sanity check only -- no tests needed.
